task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Odoo application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or Inventory app is visible in the web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the correct delivery order for the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A delivery order (Transfer) is open in Odoo with the customer 'Northwind Safety Distributors' and the product 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E' with a demand of 50.

task_completion.description: Agent set the 'Done' quantity to the available stock (30 units).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the operations tab of the delivery order, the 'Done' quantity for the 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E' is explicitly set to 30.

task_completion.description: Agent validated the delivery and chose to create a backorder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal window titled 'Create Backorder?' is visible and the agent clicks the 'Create Backorder' button, or there is evidence the backorder creation was confirmed.

task_completion.description: The original delivery is marked as 'Done' and a backorder is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status of the original delivery order shows as 'Done' (for 30 units). Additionally, a smart button or breadcrumb indicates a 'Backorder' exists, or a new transfer for the remaining 20 units is visible in the transfers list.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Odoo graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo UI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts executing the task.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the completion using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs and status changes are reflected within the actual Odoo application interface, not written in a separate document or notepad.

integrity.description: No signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the page visually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface appears standard without the browser's 'Inspect Element' or developer console open to manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Name: Northwind Safety Distributors. Product Name: Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E. Total Ordered: 50 units. Stock Available: 30 units. Expected Backorder Quantity: 20 units. The agent must process exactly 30 units as 'Done' on the initial delivery order and confirm the creation of a backorder for the remaining 20 units.
